title: Jormungand
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 'Perfect Order' (12) = 24; the S2 clip-show recap (Episode 12.5) is not counted. Manga complete at 70 chapters (11 volumes); S1 adapts volumes 1-6 (ch. 1-36) and S2 adapts volumes 7-11 (ch. 37-70), matching per-volume episode counts reported by Wikipedia. Arc names and boundaries taken from the fandom wiki's chapter and episode lists. One manga chapter (49, 'Serpent Looking Up to the Heavens') is adapted out of numeric sequence as a flashback cold-open in Episode 13; the ranges below follow overall chapter order rather than air order for that handoff.

mappings.arc: Fire Hare / Gun Metal, Calico Road
Kasper in Asia / Kasper and Jonah
Serpent Looking Up to the Heavens / Pazuzu
